title: Emergency Floating Orange Survival Kit Safety Whistle Clip-On (Many Pack Sizes)
description:
Whether you’re camping, hiking, boating or enjoying an adventure outdoors, a survival whistle is a must-have emergency accessory. The ASR Outdoor Floating Emergency Whistles are a great addition to any boat, survival kit, or camping gear! These whistles are constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust or corrode, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it’s lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time, rain, or shine. The lightweight plastic whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate them during an emergency in case you drop them in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for boating at sea, in the river, or on the lake

Emergency Floating Orange Survival Kit Safety Whistle Clip-On (Many Pack Sizes)

Whether you’re camping, hiking, boating or enjoying an adventure outdoors, a survival whistle is a must-have emergency accessory. The ASR Outdoor Floating Emergency Whistles are a great addition to any boat, survival kit, or camping gear!

These whistles are constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust or corrode, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it’s lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time, rain, or shine.

Key Features

  • HIGH QUALITY CONSTRUCTION – The ASR Outdoor survival kit whistles are made of durable, high-quality plastic that won’t rust, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it’s super-lightweight, waterproof and will stand the test of time.
  • SUPER LOUD SURVIVAL WHISTLE – Our waterproof whistles blast a loud noise when blown in order to draw everyone’s attention in case of an outdoor emergency. The high-pitched sound can be heard from a long distance, making this an essential safety whistle for camping and boating.
  • HIGH VISIBILITY, DESIGNED TO FLOAT – The lightweight whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate the whistle during an emergency in case you drop it in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for boating at sea, in the river or on the lake.
  • KEY CHAIN CLIP – Our unique design features a clip on attachment so you can easily affix it to your life jacket, backpack, swimsuit or pocket. The plastic whistle comes with a lanyard hole as well so you can use it as a keychain in your survival kit or bug out bag!
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Adjustable lanyard and clip on attachment; High visibility orange color; Floats in water; Dimensions: 2” x .5” x .5”; Weight: .01lbs or .16oz (lightweight); Pack sizes available; 1 pack, 4 pack, 36 pack, 72 pack

Product Specifications

  • MPN: FLOATMRWHST
  • UPC: 705546763852
  • Color: Orange

The lightweight plastic whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate them during an emergency in case you drop them in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for boating at sea, in the river, or on the lake.

Our unique design features a clip-on attachment so you can easily affix the whistle to your life jacket, backpack, swimsuit, or pocket. The plastic whistles come with a lanyard hole as well so you can use them as a keychain in your survival kit or bug-out bag!

These whistles come in the following pack sizes: 1 pack, 4 pack, 36 pack, or 72 pack. They each measure 2” x .5” x .5” and weigh just .16 ounces. Make sure to grab a set of these for your emergency and survival needs!
